title: WerbEquipmentProfile
description: Profile of a brewing setup (mash tun, kettle, fermenter) used to compute volumes, losses, and efficiency for a brew session.

name.description: Human-readable name of the equipment profile (e.g. 'Brewzilla 35L', 'Cooler MLT + propane kettle').

batch_size_l.description: Target finished batch volume into the fermenter, in liters.

efficiency_pct.description: Total brewhouse efficiency, percent (mash + lauter + boil losses considered).

grain_absorption_l_per_kg.description: Liters of water absorbed per kg of grain. Typical: 0.8-1.0 L/kg.

evaporation_rate_l_per_hour.description: Boil-off rate in L/hour. Typical: 2-4 L/h depending on kettle and burner.

post_boil_shrinkage_pct.description: Volume reduction percentage from boiling temperature to room temperature.

trub_loss_l.description: Volume left behind as trub/yeast cake when transferring to packaging.

transfer_loss_l.description: Volume lost during transfers between vessels (kettle to fermenter, fermenter to package).
